"A spike in A is followed by a drop in B."
SEQ "A drop in B occurs after a spike in A." SEQ(SpikeA, DropB) B "A square wave in A is synchronized with a spike in B."
SYNC "A square wave in A and a spike in B occur simultaneously." SYNC(SquareWaveA, SpikeB) B "A drop in A is found within a rise in B."
GUARD "A rise in B encompasses a drop in A." GUARD(DropA, RiseB) B "Either a spike in A or a drop in B."
